data.title:
Meaningful Jewellery, Handmade in Bath England
 – Honey Willow - handmade jewellery
data.metaDescription: Honey Willow celebrates life and love: we handcraft jewellery that represents milestone events and meaningful relationships - everyday jewellery that can be worn close to your heart. Free international shipping.
data.ogTitle: Meaningful Jewellery, Handmade in Bath England
data.ogDescription: Honey Willow celebrates life and love: we handcraft jewellery that represents milestone events and meaningful relationships - everyday jewellery that can be worn close to your heart. Free international shipping.

issues.impact: Google will cut off your title in search results. You're losing valuable click-through real estate.
issues.fix: Trim to under 60 characters. Front-load your most important keywords.

issues.impact: Google truncates long descriptions. Your call-to-action is probably getting cut off.
issues.fix: Trim to 150-160 characters. Put the most important info first.

issues.impact: Search engines use H1s to understand what your page is about. You're invisible.
issues.fix: Add exactly one H1 per page that clearly describes the page content

summary: We analyzed honeywillow.com and found 3 issues affecting your search visibility and conversions. The biggest opportunities are fixing your meta tags, improving mobile optimization, and adding structured data for rich snippets. These changes could significantly increase your organic traffic within 30-60 days.
